title: Wearing a Banner and Going on an Expedition│戴著旗幟出征
description: Banner can be worn on the head.│旗幟可以戴在頭上。
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components).│該資料包需要伺服器端模組[物品組件](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components)。 ⚠️**
# Introduce│介紹
Why can illagers wear banners but I can't? With this data pack, the banner can be worn on the head like a helmet.│為甚麼災厄村民可以戴著旗幟而我卻不行？有了這個資料包，旗幟就和頭盔一樣可以戴在頭上。
